canonical_name: those who do not follow Christ
the soldiers who were not wedded
the one woman in the kingdom he could not have
the stone-flagged space before the stables
the house after all honest folk
the peaceful Tribes, who wanted no more than to till their barley crops in peace and worship the Goddess
those mighty heroes of old we spoke of before
her room where she slept with Elaine and four of Gwenhwyfar's maidens
a comer of Avalon this night-
military camp; he had been a soldier
such women as would give him no more than a moment's ease for his body
such women as wanted to toy with love-making and give nothing
some woman he could have without giving more of himself
those who came to the Goddess in this way
